topbar.message: ✦ Licensed Georgia Gold Buyer · Fair Prices · Same-Day Payment

cta.title:
Walk in.
Walk out richer.
cta.subtitle: No appointment. We test in front of you, calculate against today's live spot, settle the same day in cash, check, Zelle, CashApp, Venmo, PayPal or wire.

testimonials.name: Jerry Vaughan
testimonials.quote: Awsome salesman to work with. He's extremely fast and holds a conversation while checking coins. He made sure to keep everything organized and separated also!. If silver was not so low he had it.

testimonials.name: Jaime Lee
testimonials.quote: Super professional, knowledgeable, and fair. Would definitely recommend. If for whatever reason you don't like the owner (which I don't see how you wouldnt) his dog Champ will steal your heart!

testimonials.name: Brandon Coots
testimonials.quote: Not only did I have a great experience I was going to be there after they closed. I have a quick call and not only did he start his process over the phone he also waited on me and stayed open almost an hour after his advertised close time to wait on me. Then made the best deal I've been offered out of 30 different places I went too. Very friendly professional and knowledgeable. Blew all competitors out of the water by a long shot. All it took was a simple call letting him know I was on the way. Will go here for all of my future needs and will recommend to everyone. Great customer service skills. A+++

testimonials.name: Luis Elias
testimonials.quote: Bery please to do business here everything straight forward. Precious Metals and jewelry.

testimonials.name: Taylor Dodson
testimonials.quote: Had a fantastic time – fair prices, incredibly helpful and knowledgeable. This was my second visit and I'm definitely planning to return. I highly recommend checking this store out.

testimonials.name: Chad Usher
testimonials.quote: I've been to this store numerous times and they are always helpful! Adam is more than willing to share his knowledge about gold and jewelry prices and what the market is doing. I've been more than happy with everything I've purchased from them!

testimonials.name: Debbie Meadow
testimonials.quote: This was a great experience. I'm happy, their happy, in and out and that day they even could pay in cash. Thanks

testimonials.name: Herb James
testimonials.quote: Bought some 20 Franc Gold coins here last week. Very personable owner and great value, nice looking coins. Very satisfied with my purchase, wish I could have bought them all. : )

locationsSection.title:
Two doors,
same handshake.
locationsSection.body: Two Georgia counters. Licensed precious-metals dealers. We buy gold, silver, jewelry, coins, and valuables — transparent pricing, same-day payment, no pressure. Walk in anytime, Mon–Sat 10AM–6PM.

footer.desc: Licensed Georgia precious-metals dealer. We buy gold, silver, jewelry, coins, and valuables. Transparent pricing, same-day payment, no pressure.

whatWeBuy.seoTitle: What We Buy — Gold Kings | Georgia's Premier Gold Buyer
whatWeBuy.seoDescription: Gold Kings buys gold jewelry, silver flatware, coins, bullion, scrap gold, dental gold, estate jewelry and luxury watches. Snellville & Commerce, GA.
whatWeBuy.heroSub: Gold, silver, coins, watches — any karat, any condition, any quantity. Walk in. Walk out with cash.

editorial.alt: Gold jewelry collection including chains, rings and bracelets
editorial.title:
Every Karat.
Every Form.
editorial.body: Any karat from 10K to 24K. Yellow, white, and rose gold. Chains, rings, bracelets, earrings, and pendants. Even broken or mismatched pieces carry full metal value — condition does not reduce your payout.
editorial.list:
• 10K, 14K, 18K, 22K, 24K gold
  • Yellow, white, and rose gold
  • Chains, rings, bracelets, earrings, pendants
  • Broken, bent, or incomplete pieces
  • Single earrings and mismatched sets

editorial.alt: Sterling silver flatware and serving pieces
editorial.title:
Sterling Silver,
Any Form.
editorial.body: Sterling silver (.925) in any form — flatware, serving trays, bowls, creamers, candelabras, and jewelry. Priced on live silver market rates at the moment you walk in. No guesswork, no estimates from outdated price sheets.
editorial.list:
• Sterling silver (.925) flatware sets
  • Serving trays and bowls
  • Silver jewelry of all styles
  • Candlesticks and decorative pieces
  • Mixed-silver lots and collections

editorial.alt: Gold and silver coins and bullion bars
editorial.title:
Investment Grade
& Collectible.
editorial.body: Investment-grade bullion coins, collectible U.S. and international coins, gold and silver bars, ingots, and rounds. Whether you have a single American Eagle or a full estate collection, we evaluate each piece individually.
editorial.list:
• American Gold & Silver Eagles
  • Canadian Maple Leafs, Krugerrands
  • Pre-1933 U.S. gold coins
  • Gold and silver bars and ingots
  • International and commemorative coins

editorial.alt: Scrap gold pieces and broken jewelry
editorial.title:
Condition
Is Irrelevant.
editorial.body: Broken clasps, bent chains, single earrings, dental crowns and bridges. What looks like junk to others is pure metal value to us. Dental gold is often 16K or higher — some of the most valuable scrap you'll bring in.
editorial.list:
• Broken chains, clasps, and findings
  • Bent or crushed pieces
  • Dental crowns, bridges, and fillings
  • Gold from removed orthodontic work
  • Loose settings and mountings

editorial.title:
Collections &
Heirlooms.
editorial.body: Large collections, inherited pieces, and luxury watches including Rolex. Estate evaluations handled with care. Each piece assessed individually so nothing of value is overlooked. Bring the full collection — we work through it properly.
editorial.list:
• Inherited jewelry collections
  • Luxury watches including Rolex
  • Antique and Victorian-era pieces
  • Estate lots of mixed jewelry
  • Church and fundraising gold donations

howItWorks.seoTitle: How Selling Your Gold Works — Gold Kings | 5-Step Process
howItWorks.seoDescription: Our 5-step buying process: bring it in, we test & weigh in front of you, live spot pricing, clear cash offer, you decide. No pressure.
howItWorks.heroSub: Walk in. Watch us test and weigh. Hear how the offer is calculated. Decide. That's the whole process.

prices.seoTitle: Live Gold & Silver Prices — Gold Kings Georgia
prices.seoDescription: Live gold and silver spot prices. Understand how Gold Kings calculates your offer — based on live market rates, karat purity, and certified weight.
prices.heroSub: We don't guess. We don't use outdated charts. We use the live spot price at the moment you walk in — and we show you every step of the calculation.

jewelry.seoTitle: Jewelry by Weight — Gold Kings | Market-Rate Gold & Silver
jewelry.seoDescription: Gold Kings sells gold and silver jewelry by weight at current market rates. No retail markup, transparent pricing. Visit our Snellville or Commerce, GA store.
jewelry.heroSub: Choose from our curated selection of gold and silver jewelry. Priced at current market value — not retail markup. What you pay is what the metal is worth.

faqs.seoTitle: FAQs — Gold Kings | Selling Gold in Georgia
faqs.seoDescription: Frequently asked questions about selling gold, silver, and jewelry at Gold Kings. Snellville & Commerce, GA. Licensed precious-metals dealer.
faqs.heroSub: Everything you need to know before you walk in. No fine print. No surprises.

about.seoTitle: About Gold Kings — Honest, Transparent, Fair | Snellville & Commerce, GA
about.seoDescription: Gold Kings is a locally-operated, licensed Georgia precious-metals buyer. Two counters, one promise: weigh in front of you, calculate live, settle same-day.
about.heroSub: Selling gold and silver should be honest, transparent, and fair. That's the principle the business was built on. Two Georgia counters, one promise.

whyChoose.seoTitle: Why Choose Gold Kings — Transparent, Licensed, No Pressure
whyChoose.seoDescription: Why customers choose Gold Kings: testing in front of you, no-pressure environment, immediate payment, licensed dealer, better than a pawn shop.
whyChoose.heroSub: Six reasons customers come back, send friends, and trust us with the items that matter to them.

churchFundraising.seoTitle: Church Gold Fundraising Program — Gold Kings | Faith-Based Stewardship
churchFundraising.seoDescription: Gold Kings partners with churches to convert donated gold & silver into ministry funding. Transparent process, respectful handling, fair market pricing.
churchFundraising.heroSub: Help your congregation turn unused gold and silver into real funding for ministry — through a transparent process you can show your members.

refundReturns.seoDescription: Gold Kings is a precious-metals dealer, not a pawn shop. All sales are final. Read our refund & returns policy.
refundReturns.heroSub: We're a precious-metals dealer, not a pawn shop. Make sure you're comfortable with the offer before accepting payment.
